Enum Class InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Internal.EnumLite, com.google.protobuf.ProtocolMessageEnum, Serializable, Comparable<InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
InstanceAuditLogResponse
public static enum InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType extends Enum<InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType> implements com.google.protobuf.ProtocolMessageEnum
Types of actions that are recorded in the audit log.
Protobuf enum soulfire.v1.InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    AUTOMATION_APPLY_PRESET
    An automation preset was applied.
    AUTOMATION_PAUSE
    Automation was paused.
    AUTOMATION_RELEASE_CLAIMS
    Automation claims were manually released.
    AUTOMATION_RESET_COORDINATION
    Shared automation coordination state was reset.
    AUTOMATION_RESET_MEMORY
    Automation memory was reset.
    AUTOMATION_RESUME
    Automation was resumed.
    AUTOMATION_START
    Beat or acquire automation was started.
    AUTOMATION_STOP
    Automation was stopped.
    AUTOMATION_UPDATE_SETTINGS
    Automation settings were changed.
    EXECUTE_COMMAND
    A command was executed on the instance.
    PAUSE_SESSION
    The instance session was paused.
    RESUME_SESSION
    The instance session was resumed from paused state.
    START_SESSION
    The instance session was started.
    STOP_SESSION
    The instance session was stopped.
    UNRECOGNIZED

      public static final InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType EXECUTE_COMMAND
      A command was executed on the instance.
      EXECUTE_COMMAND = 0;

      public static final InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType START_SESSION
      The instance session was started.
      START_SESSION = 1;

      public static final InstanceAuditLogResponse.AuditLogEntryType PAUSE_SESSION
      The instance session was paused.
